name: Luxury Ivory Marble Product Showcase
template: A premium studio product photograph of a above product image uploaded The product is placed neatly on a soft ivory marble surface with subtle texture, styled symmetrically to highlight the illustration and the glass vials. Soft natural daylight enters from the left side, creating gentle shadows and a warm, elegant mood. Background is minimal and clean with a shallow depth of field, slightly blurred to keep sharp focus on the product. Colors appear rich and true-to-life — deep magenta, gold, and turmeric yellow tones feel vibrant yet refined. High-resolution, professional e-commerce photography style, premium aesthetic, clean composition. No text, no branding, no hands, no human elements. Shot with a 50mm lens look, f/2.8, ultra-sharp details, soft highlights, luxury gifting presentation.

name: Premium Kumkum & Turmeric Luxury Hero Shot

name: Premium Traditional Return Gift Packaging Hero Shot
template: A premium studio hero photograph of a traditional Indian return gift product, featuring a beautifully illustrated card sealed inside a transparent pouch, with miniature glass vials of kumkum and turmeric **attached to the pouch itself** as part of the product packaging.The product is centered and perfectly aligned on a light ivory marble surface with subtle natural texture.Soft, diffused daylight enters from the left side, creating gentle, realistic shadows and a calm, luxurious mood.The transparent pouch is clearly visible with natural folds and reflections, showcasing the illustration and the attached glass vials in a neat, cohesive presentation (vials are not separated or placed independently).Background is clean, minimal, and softly blurred with a shallow depth of field to keep full focus on the product.Colors appear rich, vibrant, and premium — deep magenta, gold accents, turmeric yellow, and kumkum red look elegant and true-to-life.Ultra–high resolution, professional e-commerce photography style, sharp focus, clean composition, luxury gifting aesthetic.No text, no branding, no hands, no human elements, no clutter.*Shot with a 50mm lens look, f/2.8, natural highlights, soft shadows, premium catalog lighting.*
